title: Previewkit .preview.yaml
description: Configuration file that defines how a repository should be deployed as an ephemeral preview environment by Previewkit.

domain.description: Override the default base domain for this preview (e.g. preview.example.com). Apps are served at https://{app}.pr-{N}.{owner}.{domain}.

registry.description: Override the container registry used for built images.

apps.description: Application containers to build and deploy. Each app becomes a Kubernetes Deployment + Service + Ingress.

services.description: Managed backing services provisioned from built-in recipes (postgres, redis, etc.).

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks that run during the deploy.

post_deploy.description: Commands to run inside an app pod after all apps are healthy (e.g. migrations, seeding).

k8sName.description: Lowercase DNS-1123 name. Letters, digits, and hyphens only; must start and end with alphanumeric.

resources.description: DEPRECATED and ignored. Every app and service is allocated a standard 1000m CPU / 1Gi memory. The field is still accepted so existing configs validate, but cpu/memory values have no effect. Remove it.

branchConvention.description: How to derive the dependency repo branch name from the main app PR branch.

oneOf.description: Use the exact same branch name as the main app PR branch. Falls back to fallback_branch if not found.
Apply a regex to the main app branch name to derive the dependency branch. Falls back to fallback_branch if no match.

pattern.description: Regex applied to the main app branch name (e.g. '^feat/(.+)$').

replacement.description: Replacement string applied to the main app branch. Supports capture groups: $1, $2, etc.

oneOf.description: Always use fallback_branch. No automatic branch resolution.

repoDependency.description: A dependency repository included in the preview environment.

name.description: Alias for this repo. Must be a valid Kubernetes name.

fallback_branch.description: Branch to clone when no convention-resolved branch exists in this repo.

multirepoConfig.description: Multi-repo preview configuration. Declares dependency repos and how branches are matched.

branch_convention.description: How to match dependency repo branches to the main app PR branch. Defaults to always using fallback_branch.

repos.description: Dependency repos to clone and build together with the primary repo.

name.description: App name. Used for the Service DNS, Ingress host, and template references ({{name.host}}).

path.description: Build context path relative to the repo root.

dockerfile.description: Path to a Dockerfile. If omitted, Railpack auto-detects and generates one.

build_args.description: Docker build args (ARG). Baked into the image at build time. Supports template variables.

port.description: Container port the app listens on.

env.description: Runtime environment variables. Supports template variables: {{service.host}}, {{service.port}}, {{app.host}}, {{app.port}}, {{pr}}, {{namespace}}, {{owner}}.

primary.description: Marks this app as the primary entry point. Previewkit uses its URL to trigger Autonoma diffs analysis after deploy. If omitted, the first app in the list is used.

depends_on.description: Names of backend repos (from config.multirepo.repos) or other apps that must be deployed before this one. Builds still run in parallel; only deploys are ordered.

name.description: Service name. Referenced from apps via {{name.host}} and {{name.port}}.

recipe.description: Built-in recipe that provisions the service.

version.description: Recipe image version tag (e.g. '16' for postgres, '8' for redis).

env.description: Extra environment variables passed to the recipe container.

options.description: Recipe-specific options. For api-gateway: { routes: [{ path, target, strip_prefix?, rewrite? }], client_max_body_size? }.

routes.description: api-gateway: ordered list of path-prefix routes. Matched longest-prefix first.

target.description: Upstream URL or host:port. Supports template vars: {{service.host}}:{{service.port}}. If no scheme, http:// is assumed.

strip_prefix.description: If true, strip the matched path before proxying (e.g. /auth/login -> /login).

rewrite.description: Explicit path rewrite replacement. Overrides strip_prefix.

client_max_body_size.description: api-gateway: max request body size (nginx syntax).

app.description: Name of the app whose pod the command runs inside.

command.description: Shell command to execute via kubectl exec.
